emotional_tone: Technical, punchy, immersive, professional, and tactile.

guidelines: Use 'JetBrains Mono' strictly for numerical displays like BPM, Time Signatures, and VU meter values.
Use 'Manrope' for all track names, tooltips, menus, and labels to ensure maximum legibility at small sizes.
Never use Inter, Roboto, or Space Grotesk.

layout.structure: Grid/Flex hybrid. Full viewport height (100vh), overflow-hidden on body.
layout.top_bar: h-16 flex items-center justify-between px-4 border-b border-white/10 bg-[#09090B] z-50
layout.left_panel: w-64 flex flex-col border-r border-white/10 bg-[#18181B] overflow-y-auto
layout.center_panel: flex-1 flex flex-col bg-[#09090B] overflow-y-auto relative
layout.right_panel: w-72 flex flex-col border-l border-white/10 bg-[#18181B] overflow-y-auto

track_row.container: flex items-center w-full h-24 bg-[#18181B] border border-white/5 rounded-md overflow-hidden transition-colors hover:bg-[#27272A]
track_row.controls: flex flex-col w-48 p-2 border-r border-white/5 gap-2

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black font-semibold px-4 py-2 rounded flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-zinc-200 transition-colors
buttons.transport: w-10 h-10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center bg-zinc-800 hover:bg-zinc-700 text-white transition-all

vu_meter.container: w-2 h-16 bg-black rounded flex flex-col-reverse overflow-hidden

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text over colored tags passes APCA 3:1.
accessibility.aria: Use aria-pressed for active states on solo/mute/metronome buttons.

images.description: Colorful studio equalizer board, to be used with a heavy dark overlay (bg-black/80) as an immersive background for the empty workspace when no tracks are loaded.

instructions_to_main_agent: Create a JS-based React application (NOT TSX) using Tailwind CSS and standard Shadcn components customized for a dark theme.
Implement Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) or Lucide-react for all UI iconography (transport, tracks, metronome).
The layout must have three primary columns: left transport/mixer, center timeline/tracks, right inspector/AI Dream Track.
Track rows must dynamically apply colors from the track_types object to their left border and waveform canvas.
Mock the Magic12 Source Separation and Mastering features, but create highly polished, animated UI for them (e.g., progress bars, status text).
Mock the 'Dream Track' AI Generation with a prompt input, a generating state with a fake progress interval, and appending a 'Dream' type track.
Keyboard shortcuts (Space, M, 1-9) must be implemented with React hooks.
CRITICAL: All interactive elements (buttons, sliders, inputs) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='play-button', data-testid='track-mute-1').
